_comment: claudemaxxing config — edit these values to match your subscription

plan._tier_note: Options: Pro ($20), Max5x ($100), Max20x ($200) -- update limits block if you change plan
plan._billing_day_note: Set to whichever day of month your subscription renews

limits._note: These are Anthropic's documented limits for Pro. Update if Anthropic changes them.
limits._sonnet_hours_note: Anthropic's cap, affects top 5% of users — not a practical weekly target
limits._windows_note: Practical weekly target used for underutilization check (10 windows x 44K = 440K tokens)
limits._opus_note: Pro plan has no documented Opus allocation — set to 0

thresholds._window_note: Trigger burn if 5hr window usage < this % of limit
thresholds._weekly_note: Trigger burn if rolling 7-day usage < this % of budget
thresholds._last_night_note: Hour (local 24h) at which 'last night of week' logic activates (Sunday only)

policy_check._interval_note: How often to re-fetch Anthropic's rate limit docs and diff them
policy_check._offsec_note: OffSec PEN-200 page monitored for syllabus changes — update _claude-review/oscp-syllabus.md if flagged

vault._note: Path to the git repo you want vault_status.py to track. Supports ~ expansion.

autoburn._note: Only run during these hours. 22/8 = 22:00-07:59 (overnight). Set both to 0 for all-day.
